MADE TO PERFORM

The AI meme coin that generates traffic, interest and hype in no time

Don't need to waste money and time with bad ad campaigns, bad social media, fake influencers and all of that. The AI does all the work in ways other meme coins can only dream of

  • Powerful AI tools running 24/7 to the token
  • Covering popular spots and creating engaging content automatically
  • Future-proof concent which can keep itself up

FLOKIDONGER

connects to everything

While the AI does all the work worse tokens abuse their community for all YOU need to do is to hold FLOKIDONGER tokens and earn automatically more tokens on a passive 8% APR per year without restricting staking mechanisms, you only need to have the tokens yourself.

No selling tax
No buying tax
No manipulated contracts, contract renounced
Passive token earnings included

Road Map

2025-

Where the AI is used

YouTube

Creation of AI based video content, comment spread on all relevant videos

X (formerly Twitter)

Creation of AI based content, comment replies to relevant comments, comments to relevant topics, building up of trending keywords

Instagram

Engaging images and reels fitting right into the meme coin niche, automated scheduled posting

Meta (formerly Facebook)

Creation of AI based content, posts relevant to niche, comment replies to popular profiles

TikTok

Hard hitting on the TikTok algorithm with short, funny, engaging reels showcasing the token

And that's not it...

Blog post creation, relevant blogs on major platforms, relevant forum posts, relevant comments, relevant replies to platforms like Quora and so much more to come

General description

FLOKIDONGER Tokens can be claimed on the ETH and BNB blockchains.

FLOKIDONGER will pay up to 8% APR (based on holding token amount) in passive token yield to its holders

FAQ

Frequency Asked Questions

How can I buy the tokens?

Our swap provider powered by the Coinbase API allows you to connect any ERC-20 compatible wallet, such as Metamask, Trustwallet, Coinbase wallet and others through QR code. Connect the wallet with ETH or BNB (or compatible tokens) and press "Confirm" on the request. Then you can select the amount of tokens you want to swap for FLOKIDONGER to finish your swap. Please contact our livechat support if you don't see the tokens added right away.


What do I do with my tokens?

During the presale you have the options to just hold them and earn passively or you can sell them at any time on popular DEX pages such as Uniswap, Pancakeswap if you feel like it. We do not have any selling tax or restrictions which would make selling difficult or even impossible as we believe in free markets.

When can I trade on exchanges?

We expect that the first known central exchanges (CEXs) will list the token FLOKIDONGER in Q3/Q4 of 2024. If you sign-up for our newsletter you will be informed about everything coming up for FLOKIDONGER.

Why is this meme coin better than any of the other 1000s of them?

First of all that would be up to you to decide, but we believe that we are actually making the right steps in bringing sustained and advanced traffic to this project. Most of these coins die too fast because they have nobody being interested in pushing them anymore after it hits certain values or they try to work with bad ads which then eventually stop, or they use shady influencers with negative reputation. There are just so many things which cause failure and it's a fair reason why 98% of investors won't see any green at all, let's be honest about that. We try to eliminate these factors by having the best available AI working for us, time for a new generation of meme coins!
